column5: As I've learned about filmmaking, this crazy guy has seemed to have words of wisdom for every single aspect of it. It's not just the quantity either; I genuinely get a lot out of what he says and find him super inspiring. Taxi Driver may be the only thing I've seen from him that I would consider an all-time favorite, but he is incredibly talented of course and I will never not be excited to watch or rewatch any of his movies. mob flick.

column2: Who's That Knocking at My Door
